ComponentType: Integrated Ideal Diode / Power Switch with Reverse Polarity Protection
Description: The LM66100 is a single-input, single-output (SISO) integrated circuit that functions as an ideal diode using an internal P-channel MOSFET. It provides low-loss power path control with reverse current blocking, reverse polarity input protection, and a chip enable function. It is designed to replace a Schottky diode, offering significantly lower forward voltage drop and power loss, and can be used in ORing configurations for power multiplexing.

KeyParameters.Package: SC-70 (6-pin), Body Size: 2.1 mm x 2.0 mm

Functions.FunctionDescription: Active-low chip enable. A voltage higher than VIN disables the device. Can be connected to VOUT for reverse current protection. Must not be left floating.
Not internally connected. Can be tied to GND or left floating.
Active-low, open-drain status output. Pulled low when the chip is disabled. High-impedance (Hi-Z) when enabled. Connect to GND if not used.
